name: Election to Apply Built-In Loss Limitation to Stock Basis

eligibility.description: Available for Section 351 transactions where the aggregate adjusted basis of transferred property exceeds its fair market value.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a transferor and transferee to elect to reduce the transferor's stock basis instead of the transferee's asset basis when transferring property with a net built-in loss.
